title: RealityScanFlow — Quick Guide
intro: Batch processor for RealityScan. Point at a folder, pick a preset, let it cook.
setup: 1. Open config.json and check rs_executable points to your RealityScan.exe
2. Open RealityScan, configure alignment/mesh/texture settings the way you want
3. Application menu -> Export Global Settings -> save as metadata/global_settings.rsconfig
4. All presets will use these settings automatically

commands.desc: Show all available presets with descriptions
Process a folder. Tool auto-detects: single scan if photos inside, batch if subfolders
Process current directory — cd into it first
Continue existing .rsproj files instead of starting from photos (add --project-mode at the end)

tips: Avoid spaces in folder paths — RealityScan CLI breaks on them
Each preset saves project with its own suffix, so preview and raw_scan don't conflict
Edit metadata/global_settings.rsconfig anytime — re-export from RealityScan GUI
Add new presets by dropping a .json file into presets/ folder
